_publications._publicationTitle: Development of CAR-T cell therapy for NF1/SWN-related nerve sheath tumor treatment.

_contextSnippet: At an E:T ratio of 0.25: 1, E2 and NEC lost their tumor-lysing activity, whereas 806 was still able to lyse 75% of the tumor cells
details: Lost tumor-lysing activity at E:T ratio of 0.25:1
